title: Block Info
description: Hover your crosshair over certain blocks to show their block information!
body:
# Hover your crosshair over certain blocks to show their block information!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/d2Od1x5I/images/680d6f50d2a841cfc295ad19e44b83115bfd14fb.png)

# Block Infos added to:
- Waxed Blocks
- Infested Blocks
- Beehives
- Bee Nests
- Crops
- Saplings
- Redstone
- Item Frames
- Flower Pots
- Composters
- Respawn Anchors
